comments.body:
## Summary of Changes Hello, I'm Gemini Code Assist[^1]! I'm currently reviewing this pull request and will post my feedback shortly. In the meantime, here's a summary to help you and other reviewers quickly get up to speed! This pull request completes a significant architectural shift by migrating the application's entire database layer from PostgreSQL/Drizzle to MongoDB/Mongoose. This change streamlines the data model by leveraging MongoDB's document-oriented nature, particularly by embedding related data directly into documents rather than relying on junction tables. The migration also simplifies local development by replacing the PostgreSQL Docker dependency with a MongoDB service, while maintaining full type safety and ensuring all existing application functionalities are preserved and thoroughly tested. ### Highlights * **Database Migration**: The application has been fully migrated from PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM to MongoDB with Mongoose ODM, simplifying the data layer and local development setup. * **Environment Configuration**: Updated environment variables and `docker-compose.yml` to support MongoDB, including new `.env.prod` and `.env.test` files, and replaced `DATABASE_URL` with `MONGODB_URI`. * **Data Modeling Changes**: Relational junction tables have been replaced with embedded ObjectId arrays within Mongoose documents for taxonomy references (meals, courses, preparations) and cookbook recipes, aligning with MongoDB's document model. * **Authentication Adapter Update**: Better-Auth has been reconfigured to use its native `mongodbAdapter`, sharing the Mongoose connection client. * **API and Logic Refactor**: All tRPC routers and database interaction logic have been rewritten to utilize Mongoose models and queries, including adjustments for ObjectId validation and removal of Drizzle-specific helpers. * **Testing Infrastructure**: The test suite now uses `mongodb-memory-server` for isolated, in-process integration tests, and a new `withCleanDb` helper ensures a clean database state for each test. * **Documentation Updates**: Project documentation (`CLAUDE.md`, `docs/database.md`) has been updated to reflect the new MongoDB/Mongoose stack, collection structures, and setup instructions. 🧠 **New Feature in Public Preview:** You can now enable **Memory** to help **Gemini Code Assist** learn from your team's feedback. This makes future code reviews more consistent and personalized to your project's style. **Click [here](https://codeassist.google/code-review/login) to enable Memory in your admin console.**
Changelog * **.env.example** * Replaced `DATABASE_URL` with `MONGODB_URI` and updated comments for MongoDB connection. * **.env.prod** * Added production environment variables for MongoDB Atlas connection. * **.env.test** * Added test environment variables for MongoDB Atlas connection. * **CLAUDE.md** * Updated project overview, quick setup, database commands, and tech stack to reflect MongoDB and Mongoose. * **docker-compose.yml** * Replaced the PostgreSQL service with a MongoDB service and its associated volume. * **docs/database.md** * Rewrote the entire document to describe MongoDB collections, document design, connection, models, seeds, and testing. * **drizzle.config.ts** * Removed Drizzle configuration file. * **drizzle/0000_nice_giant_man.sql** * Removed initial PostgreSQL migration script. * **drizzle/0001_auth_tables.sql** * Removed Better-Auth PostgreSQL migration script. * **drizzle/0002_add_display_username.sql** * Removed display username PostgreSQL migration script. * **drizzle/0003_add_recipe_fields.sql** * Removed recipe fields PostgreSQL migration script. * **drizzle/0004_recipe_fts_index.sql** * Removed full-text search index PostgreSQL migration script. * **drizzle/meta/0000_snapshot.json** * Removed Drizzle schema snapshot metadata. * **drizzle/meta/_journal.json** * Removed Drizzle migration journal. * **openspec/changes/mongodb-migration/.openspec.yaml** * Added OpenSpec configuration for the MongoDB migration. * **openspec/changes/mongodb-migration/design.md** * Added design document detailing context, goals, decisions, risks, and migration plan for MongoDB. * **openspec/changes/mongodb-migration/proposal.md** * Added proposal document outlining the 'why' and 'what changes' for the MongoDB migration. * **openspec/changes/mongodb-migration/specs/mongodb-data-layer/spec.md** * Added specification document for the new MongoDB data layer requirements and scenarios. * **openspec/changes/mongodb-migration/tasks.md** * Added task list detailing the steps completed for the MongoDB migration. * **package.json** * Removed `drizzle-orm`, `drizzle-kit`, `pg`, `@types/pg`, `@testcontainers/postgresql` dependencies. * Added `mongoose`, `mongodb`, `mongodb-memory-server` dependencies. * Updated `db` scripts to reflect MongoDB commands (`db:connect` added, Drizzle commands removed). * **playwright.config.ts** * Modified `webServer` command to run in test mode for Playwright E2E tests. * **src/db/index.ts** * Rewritten to establish a Mongoose connection singleton and export a `getMongoClient` helper. * **src/db/models/account.ts** * Added Mongoose model for user accounts. * **src/db/models/classification.ts** * Added Mongoose model for recipe classifications. * **src/db/models/columns.ts** * Added shared Mongoose schema helpers for ObjectId types and timestamps. * **src/db/models/cookbook.ts** * Added Mongoose model for cookbooks, embedding recipe entries. * **src/db/models/course.ts** * Added Mongoose model for course types. * **src/db/models/index.ts** * Added barrel export for all Mongoose models. * **src/db/models/meal.ts** * Added Mongoose model for meal types. * **src/db/models/preparation.ts** * Added Mongoose model for preparation methods. * **src/db/models/recipe-like.ts** * Added Mongoose model for recipe likes with a compound index. * **src/db/models/recipe.ts** * Added Mongoose model for recipes, embedding taxonomy references. * **src/db/models/session.ts** * Added Mongoose model for user sessions. * **src/db/models/source.ts** * Added Mongoose model for recipe sources. * **src/db/models/user.ts** * Added Mongoose model for users. * **src/db/models/verification.ts** * Added Mongoose model for verification tokens. * **src/db/schema/accounts.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for accounts. * **src/db/schema/classifications.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for classifications. * **src/db/schema/columns.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema helpers for primary keys and timestamps. * **src/db/schema/cookbook_followers.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for cookbook followers. * **src/db/schema/cookbook_recipes.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for cookbook recipes. * **src/db/schema/cookbooks.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for cookbooks. * **src/db/schema/courses.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for courses. * **src/db/schema/index.ts** * Removed barrel export for Drizzle schemas. * **src/db/schema/meals.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for meals. * **src/db/schema/preparations.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for preparations. * **src/db/schema/recipe_courses.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for recipe courses. * **src/db/schema/recipe_images.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for recipe images. * **src/db/schema/recipe_likes.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for recipe likes. * **src/db/schema/recipe_meals.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for recipe meals. * **src/db/schema/recipe_preparations.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for recipe preparations. * **src/db/schema/recipes.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for recipes. * **src/db/schema/sessions.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for sessions. * **src/db/schema/sources.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for sources. * **src/db/schema/users.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for users. * **src/db/schema/verifications.ts** * Removed Drizzle schema for verifications. * **src/db/seeds/courses.ts** * Modified to use Mongoose for seeding course data with upsert logic. * **src/db/seeds/index.ts** * Modified to connect to MongoDB and use Mongoose seed functions. * **src/db/seeds/meals.ts** * Modified to use Mongoose for seeding meal data with upsert logic. * **src/db/seeds/preparations.ts** * Modified to use Mongoose for seeding preparation data with upsert logic. * **src/e2e/helpers/auth.ts** * Modified `registerAndLogin` and `login` functions to use direct API calls instead of UI forms for improved reliability in E2E tests. * **src/lib/__tests__/auth.test.ts** * Updated mocks to reflect Mongoose integration instead of Drizzle. * **src/lib/auth.ts** * Switched from `drizzleAdapter` to `mongodbAdapter` for Better-Auth and removed Drizzle-specific configuration. * **src/server/trpc/__tests__/context.test.ts** * Updated mocks and assertions to remove `db` property from tRPC context. * **src/server/trpc/__tests__/init.test.ts** * Updated mocks to remove `db` property from tRPC context. * **src/server/trpc/__tests__/integration.test.ts** * Updated test setup to use `withCleanDb` and Mongoose models, replacing Drizzle-specific schema imports and UUID validation with ObjectId validation. * **src/server/trpc/context.ts** * Removed `db` from the tRPC context as database access is now handled directly by Mongoose models. * **src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/cookbooks.test.ts** * Updated tests to use `withCleanDb` and Mongoose models for cookbook operations, replacing Drizzle-specific seeding and query logic. * **src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/helpers.test.ts** * Updated `visibilityFilter` and `verifyOwnership` tests to reflect Mongoose query syntax and removed `syncJunction` tests. * **src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/recipes.test.ts** * Updated tests to use `withCleanDb` and Mongoose models for recipe operations, replacing Drizzle-specific seeding, query logic, and UUID validation. * **src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/sources.test.ts** * Updated tests to use `withCleanDb` and Mongoose models for source operations, replacing Drizzle-specific seeding and query logic. * **src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/taxonomy.test.ts** * Updated tests to use `withCleanDb` and Mongoose models for taxonomy operations, replacing Drizzle-specific seeding and query logic. * **src/server/trpc/routers/_helpers.ts** * Modified `visibilityFilter` to return Mongoose filter objects and `verifyOwnership` to work with Mongoose documents; removed `syncJunction` helper. * Updated `createTaxonomyRouter` to use Mongoose models instead of Drizzle tables. * **src/server/trpc/routers/classifications.ts** * Rewritten to use Mongoose `Classification` and `Recipe` models for listing and fetching classifications, including recipe counts. * **src/server/trpc/routers/cookbooks.ts** * Rewritten to use Mongoose `Cookbook` and `Recipe` models, replacing Drizzle queries and junction table logic with embedded document operations and updated ID validation. * **src/server/trpc/routers/courses.ts** * Updated to use Mongoose `Course` model via `createTaxonomyRouter`. * **src/server/trpc/routers/meals.ts** * Updated to use Mongoose `Meal` model via `createTaxonomyRouter`. * **src/server/trpc/routers/preparations.ts** * Updated to use Mongoose `Preparation` model via `createTaxonomyRouter`. * **src/server/trpc/routers/recipes.ts** * Rewritten to use Mongoose `Recipe` and `RecipeLike` models, replacing Drizzle queries and junction table logic with embedded document operations and updated ID validation. * **src/server/trpc/routers/sources.ts** * Rewritten to use Mongoose `Source` model for listing, searching, and creating sources, and updated ID validation. * **src/server/trpc/routers/users.ts** * Rewritten to use Mongoose `User` model for fetching and updating user profiles. * **src/test-helpers/__tests__/db-global-setup.unit.test.ts** * Updated unit tests to reflect the switch from PostgreSQL Testcontainers to `mongodb-memory-server`. * **src/test-helpers/__tests__/with-db-tx.unit.test.ts** * Removed unit tests for `withDbTx` and `closeTestPool` (PostgreSQL-specific). * **src/test-helpers/db-connect.ts** * Added a Vitest setup file to ensure Mongoose connects in each worker process for isolated testing. * **src/test-helpers/db-global-setup.ts** * Rewritten to start `mongodb-memory-server` and connect Mongoose globally for the test suite, replacing PostgreSQL setup. * **src/test-helpers/with-clean-db.ts** * Added a new helper function to clear all Mongoose collections before each test for isolation. * **vite.config.ts** * Modified to load environment variables into `process.env` for server-side access during development and testing. * **vitest.config.ts** * Updated `globalSetup` to point to the new MongoDB setup and added `db-connect.ts` to `setupFiles`.
Activity * The author, dougis, has completed the full migration from PostgreSQL/Drizzle to MongoDB/Mongoose. * All unit tests and end-to-end tests are reported as passing, indicating a successful transition and verification of functionality.
Using Gemini Code Assist
The full guide for Gemini Code Assist can be found on our [documentation page](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/review-github-code), here are some quick tips. Invoking Gemini You can request assistance from Gemini at any point by creating a comment using either `/gemini ` or `@gemini-code-assist `. Below is a summary of the supported commands on the current page. Feature | Command | Description --- | --- | --- Code Review | `/gemini review` | Performs a code review for the current pull request in its current state. Pull Request Summary | `/gemini summary` | Provides a summary of the current pull request in its current state. Comment | @gemini-code-assist | Responds in comments when explicitly tagged, both in pull request comments and review comments. Help | `/gemini help` | Displays a list of available commands. Customization To customize Gemini Code Assist for GitHub experience, repository maintainers can create a configuration file and/or provide a custom code review style guide (such as PEP-8 for Python) by creating and adding files to a `.gemini/` folder in the base of the repository. Detailed instructions can be found [here](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/customize-gemini-behavior-github). Limitations & Feedback Gemini Code Assist may make mistakes. Please leave feedback on any instances where its feedback is incorrect or counter productive. You can react with :thumbsup: and :thumbsdown: on @gemini-code-assist comments. If you're interested in giving your feedback about your experience with Gemini Code Assist for Github and other Google products, sign up [here](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_2cyuGuTWsEw84yG). You can also get AI-powered code generation, chat, as well as code reviews directly in the IDE at no cost with the [Gemini Code Assist IDE Extension](https://cloud.google.com/products/gemini/code-assist).
[^1]: Review the [Privacy Notices](https://policies.google.com/privacy), [Generative AI Prohibited Use Policy](https://policies.google.com/terms/generative-ai/use-policy), [Terms of Service](https://policies.google.com/terms), and learn how to configure Gemini Code Assist in GitHub [here](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/customize-gemini-behavior-github). Gemini can make mistakes, so double check it and [use code with caution](https://support.google.com/legal/answer/13505487).
